title: Bubble Candle,2 Pcs Cube Bubble Candles Soy Wax Scented Aromatherapy Candle Minimalist Home Decoration Aesthetic Candles for Living Room Bedroom(White)
features: Material:This bubble candle is made with high-quality soy wax and scented with a delightful freesia scent that will fill your space with a warm inviting aroma.
Size:You will recieve 2 pcs white bubble candle,the size is 6 x 6 x 5.5 cm/2.34 x 2.34 x 2.15 inch.Unique bubble texture design is both cute and sophisticated,ideal for room aesthetics.

Unique Bubble Design:Each piece is made of small round candles spliced into a square shape,with a delicate and eye-catching appearance,full of art.minimalist design complements any contemporary interior style.
Stylish and Versatile Decor:Elevate your bedroom,living room,bathroom,or coffee table with this handmade candle.Its design blends seamlessly with any decor,adding cozy sophistication.

Wide application:In addition to being used as a candle,it can also be placed in bedrooms,study rooms,bathrooms,living rooms and other places for decoration,adding a sense of design to your room,and can be used as a gift for your relatives and friends
description: Product Description This cute candle is made with high-quality soy wax and each candle can burns for a long time,scented with a delightful that will fill your space with a warm inviting aroma The natural essential oil in each candle can soothe the senses, add a pleasant aroma to any room in the house, effectively relieve fatigue and help you reduce stress The candle is perfect as a home accessory.The warm flickering of the candle creates a cosy and pleasant atmosphere. It also serves as the perfect souvenir for your loved ones for birthdays, Mother's Day or Christmas.
